prerequisites: An active Aircall account with admin access to Company Settings, required to generate API keys.
An api_id and api_token, created together from the API Keys section of the Aircall Dashboard. The api_token is shown only once at creation, so record it immediately.
A start_date value marking the earliest point from which to replicate data.

authMethods.name: API key (HTTP Basic auth)
authMethods.summary: Aircall authenticates against its Public API using the api_id and api_token pair as HTTP Basic credentials. The api_id is the username and the api_token is the password. The two values are joined as api_id:api_token, Base64-encoded, and sent in an Authorization: Basic header. Supply the api_id and api_token secret fields and the connector handles the encoding. The Public API is limited to 120 requests per minute per company.

setupSteps.title: Generate an API key in the Aircall Dashboard
setupSteps.body: Sign in to the Aircall Dashboard as an admin, open your Company Settings page, find the API Keys section, and click "Add a new API key". Aircall generates an api_id (the username) and an api_token (the password). The api_token is displayed only once at creation, so copy both values to a secure location before closing the dialog.

setupSteps.title: Provide the api_id and api_token
setupSteps.body: Enter the api_id and api_token from the previous step into the connector's required secret fields. These are used as HTTP Basic credentials (joined as api_id:api_token and Base64-encoded) against https://api.aircall.io/v1 over HTTPS.

setupSteps.title: Set the start date
setupSteps.body: Set the required start_date field to the earliest date from which the connector should replicate Aircall data.

sources.title: Aircall API References - Authentication and Rate limits
